results.term: My friend created a group chat for planning activi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My friend created a group chat for planning activities and did not include me. She included people who are closer to me than to her. Almost like she is trying to steal my friends.

results.term: In a way. I was disappointed by the rest of them b...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: In a way. I was disappointed by the rest of them but mostly angry at her. It almost feels like she wants to be the leader of the group and feels like I am her competition.

results.term: Exactly. They are supposed to be the people I can ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Exactly. They are supposed to be the people I can go to with my problems. Now I feel like they all had a secret which I wasn't privy to and it made me feel disconnected and untrusting towards them.

results.term: I am a bit of an idealist. I like for everyone to ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am a bit of an idealist. I like for everyone to be in harmony, to be nice, supportive, caring, open and honest. I don't know how to move on from this.

results.term: I talked about it with one friend. He felt bad but...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I talked about it with one friend. He felt bad but what I couldn't understand why he was secretive about the chat too. If he thought we were close why hide stuff?

results.term: Do you think it is asking too much on my part?

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Do you think it is asking too much on my part?

results.term: Sometimes I question if it is even worth talking t...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Sometimes I question if it is even worth talking to them about it. People often don't want to say what they really think. Instead they just say whatever to avoid confrontation.

results.term: Oh I know they would. I don't hang out as much as ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Oh I know they would. I don't hang out as much as they all do so that is probably why I wasn't included in the chat. But I didn't see the harm of me being in it even if I couldn't make it to most events. I guess it's the secrecy that bothers me. It makes me a bit paranoid about what else do they all know that I don't.
